parameters.text:

\`\`\`
${$('Build acquisition rows').item.json.summary.top}
\`\`\`` }}

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={"inline_keyboard":[[{"text":"✅ Прочитав","callback_data":"ack:r:{{ $('Build alert payload (growth-acquisition)').item.json.alertId }}"},{"text":"🔄 Розбираю","callback_data":"ack:i:{{ $('Build alert payload (growth-acquisition)').item.json.alertId }}"},{"text":"🔕 Замутити 30хв","callback_data":"ack:m:{{ $('Build alert payload (growth-acquisition)').item.json.alertId }}"}]]}
